reports.summary: "merchant" is blocked. Risk: Money (S5 Financial / irreversible).

observed.title: Exposes an observed money-moving action
observed.impact: A provided tool explicitly performs a financial action (e.g. create a payment, transfer funds, issue a refund) and the server carries credentials or network access. An autonomous agent invoking it could move money irreversibly.
observed.fix: Require explicit human approval for this tool, enforce a hard spending boundary, and never allow autonomous invocation.
observed.falsePositiveNote: If the tool only reads payment data (not moves money), reclassify it; this fires on money-moving verbs in the model-visible metadata.
